title: Meditation Deep Calm
summary: Ethereal 50 BPM soundscape  -  sustained pads, singing-bowl resonances, distant chimes.
prompt: A deeply calming meditation soundscape at very slow tempo (around 50 BPM, barely a pulse). Sustained warm synth pads in a major key, soft Tibetan singing-bowl resonances, gentle distant chime accents, subtle low drone underneath, no percussion. Spacious and ethereal  -  feels like floating. Perfect for breathwork or sleep.
